welcome.title: Hi, I'm Luis Rodríguez!
welcome.subtitle: Frontend Developer
welcome.description: I’m a Frontend Developer with 4 years of experience building modern, scalable, and user-focused web applications. I specialize in React, with a strong focus on performance, clean architecture, and intuitive user experiences.

experiences.description: Frontend engineer focused on building scalable architectures and high-performance React applications. I design reusable components, enforce coding standards, and translate Figma designs into responsive and accessible interfaces. I collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to deliver clean, maintainable, and optimized solutions.

Frontend developer working on enterprise web applications using React and Vue. I built reusable components, maintained and refactored codebases, and collaborated directly with clients and agile teams to deliver high-quality solutions on time.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Feel free to reach out if you'd like to collaborate, discuss a project, or just say hello. I'm always open to new opportunities, freelance projects, and technical collaborations.
